reason: Purely additive test file with no production code changes. Single new file creates a consolidated definition-of-done gate mapping 1:1 to acceptance criteria. No architectural impact on runtime modules.
conditions: Group 2 (console cleanliness) must mock global fetch for /api/geo to prevent false-positive console.error from rejected geo promise
Group 3 (audio-blocked rendering) must flush microtasks after dynamic-importing main.ts before asserting canvas state

Each describe block must restore document.body.innerHTML to '
' in afterEach since multiple groups bootstrap main.ts which mutates the DOM
Build verification via execSync must set a reasonable timeout to prevent CI hangs

architectural_impact.test_infrastructure: minimal — uses existing vitest + jsdom setup from tests/setup.ts
architectural_impact.dependencies: none — child_process is a Node built-in

files_assessment.tests/healthCheck.test.ts: New file. Consolidates four acceptance criteria into one runnable gate. Additive to existing test suite, no overlap or conflict with existing test files.

notes: Plan correctly identifies this as a single-file addition rather than a refactor of existing tests. The reviewer corrections in the plan are valid and should be treated as mandatory implementation details, not optional suggestions.
